purpose: accepted SAM3.1 adapter prompt script for the gift-box Frame Set

rejected_alternative.reason: The box-only forward diagnostic returned empty masks for ring-01 and ring-02 despite visually usable renders.

accepted_combination.reason: The same Anchor box plus the target-specific text produced clean non-empty masks on anchor, ring-01, and ring-02; a full-frame diagnostic then produced non-empty, non-border-touching masks for all nine selected frames.

scope_note: This is an adapter-specific benchmark bootstrap prompt. The editor-facing point-only service contract remains separate from this fixture.
